calendar.matters:
Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Target National Bank's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is off calendar. Target National Bank failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's minute order issued on May 22, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File And Serve First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Leave To File And Serve First Amended Complaint is continued to June 3, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and the statement of non-opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 22, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
